name: fairyteller_full_visuals
description: Generates chapter 2-5 illustrations after full-text.json using the existing visual bible and portrait sheet.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { message: "Иллюстрации полной истории готовы", artifacts: { fullVisuals: { status: "ready", chapterCount: $("Generate Full Visuals").item.json.fullVisuals.chapterCount, images: $("Generate Full Visuals").item.json.fullVisuals.images } } } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $('Generate Full Visuals').first().json;
return [{ json: payload }];
